Course closed for this cycle: Asian and Middle Eastern Studies (Japanese Studies) is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
Sep. 3, 2025
Application deadline
May. 14, 2026
These deadlines apply to applications for courses starting in Michaelmas 2026, Lent 2027 and Easter 2027.
matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Asian and Middle Eastern Studies (Japanese Studies) is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: The Japanese Studies pathway is a specially designed one-year graduate seminar and research course with substantial taught elements for students who want to deepen their undergraduate education and/or prepare for a PhD in Japanese studies.
